headline: 3 Reasons to Sell CPB and 1 Stock to Buy Instead
summary: What a brutal six months it’s been for Campbell's. The stock has dropped 25.7% and now trades at $20.57, rattling many shareholders. This might have investors contemplating their next move.

headline: William Blair Initiates Coverage On The Campbell's with Market Perform Rating
summary: William Blair  analyst David Shakno   initiates coverage on The Campbell's (NASDAQ:CPB) with a Market Perform rating.
